presets.title: Postpartum — Gentle rehab (conservative)
presets.description: A cautious 4–6 week block focused on pelvic stability, core re-education, mobility and gentle return-to-activity. Recommend healthcare clearance before starting.
presets.notes: Conservative progression designed for early postpartum return to activity; consult a healthcare professional before starting.

presets.title: Postpartum — Return to strength (progressive)
presets.description: Progressive 6–12 week block to rebuild lower-body strength, hip stability and core control, suitable for later postpartum phases once cleared.
presets.notes: Progressive strength focus with mobility and stability; increase load conservatively and stop if symptoms arise.

presets.title: Postpartum — Generator: core to strength
presets.description: Generator-mode preset that prioritizes pelvic stability, glute and hip stabilizers and core; the engine will auto-select suitable exercises from the user's filtered catalog.
presets.notes: Generator preset for gradual reintroduction to strength; defaults are conservative.

presets.title: Postpartum — Return to running (progressive)
presets.description: An 8–12 week block bridging strength, stability and cautious plyometrics to prepare for return to running. Include medical clearance and progress conservatively.
presets.notes: Progression includes controlled plyometrics once strength and load tolerance are established; always monitor symptoms.

postpart_rehab_conservative_v1.name: Postpart — Rehabilitació suau
postpart_rehab_conservative_v1.description: Bloc conservador de 4–6 setmanes centrat en estabilitat pèlvica, reeducació del core i mobilitat. Consulteu un professional de la salut.

postpart_return_strength_v1.name: Postpart — Retorn de força (progressiu)
postpart_return_strength_v1.description: Bloc progressiu de 6–12 setmanes per reconstruir força i estabilitat de malucs i core. Augmenteu càrrega de manera conservadora.

postpart_generator_core_strength_v1.name: Postpart — Generador: core → força
postpart_generator_core_strength_v1.description: Preset en mode generador que prioritza estabilitat pèlvica, glutis i estabilitzadors de maluc; l'algorisme triarà exercicis adequats.

postpart_return_to_running_v1.name: Postpart — Retorn a la cursa (progressiu)
postpart_return_to_running_v1.description: Bloc de 8–12 setmanes que integra força, estabilitat i pliometria controlada per preparar el retorn a la cursa. Cal alta prudència i aprovació mèdica.

postpart_rehab_conservative_v1.name: Postparto — Rehabilitación suave
postpart_rehab_conservative_v1.description: Bloque conservador de 4–6 semanas centrado en estabilidad pélvica, reeducación del core y movilidad. Consulte con un profesional de la salud.

postpart_return_strength_v1.name: Postparto — Retorno de fuerza (progresivo)
postpart_return_strength_v1.description: Bloque progresivo de 6–12 semanas para reconstruir fuerza y estabilidad de cadera y core. Aumente la carga de forma conservadora.

postpart_generator_core_strength_v1.name: Postparto — Generador: core → fuerza
postpart_generator_core_strength_v1.description: Preset en modo generador que prioriza estabilidad pélvica, glúteos y estabilizadores de cadera; el algoritmo seleccionará ejercicios adecuados.

postpart_return_to_running_v1.name: Postparto — Retorno a la carrera (progresivo)
postpart_return_to_running_v1.description: Bloque de 8–12 semanas que integra fuerza, estabilidad y pliometría controlada para preparar el retorno a la carrera. Precaución y aprobación médica recomendadas.

postpart_rehab_conservative_v1.name: Postpartum — Gentle rehab
postpart_rehab_conservative_v1.description: A cautious 4–6 week block focused on pelvic stability, core re-education and mobility. Consult a healthcare professional before starting.

postpart_return_strength_v1.name: Postpartum — Return to strength (progressive)
postpart_return_strength_v1.description: Progressive 6–12 week block to rebuild hip and core strength and stability. Increase load conservatively.

postpart_generator_core_strength_v1.name: Postpartum — Generator: core → strength
postpart_generator_core_strength_v1.description: Generator-mode preset prioritizing pelvic stability, glutes and hip stabilizers; the engine will select suitable exercises from your catalog.

postpart_return_to_running_v1.name: Postpartum — Return to running (progressive)
postpart_return_to_running_v1.description: An 8–12 week block combining strength, stability and cautious plyometrics to prepare for return to running. Seek medical clearance and progress conservatively.
